sandbox.title: Feature Sandbox
sandbox.subtitle: PermissionGuard demonstration
sandbox.gatedComponentDesc: Requires `trips:create` permission. Add this permission or elevate role to test.
sandbox.creatorEnabledDesc: You are authorized to write custom itinerary configurations to the central CVerify repository.
sandbox.systemControlsDesc: Requires `admin:system:view` permission. Locked for standard travelers.
sandbox.systemUnlockedDesc: You have administrative privileges to monitor platform CPU, database tables, and memory usage.
